text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I utilized my best equation, yet first place was so
far from my grasp...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Just what am I missing? What went wrong?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How can I win? What should I do? My thoughts
feel so jumbled...
choice_data_list: You can figure this out. I'm sure of it.
You can figure this out. I'm sure of it.
Your head's going to burst from overthinking!
Your head's going to burst from overthinking!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How can I win? What should I do? My thoughts
feel so jumbled...
choice_data_list: You can figure this out. I'm sure of it.
You can figure this out. I'm sure of it.
Your head's going to burst from overthinking!
Your head's going to burst from overthinking!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but you don't need to lie to cheer me
up...

I nod firmly to dispel the uneasiness I see in her
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have so much faith in me, and I know it's not
groundless.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have always been there to support me with
your advice. It's always been that way, and I hope
that continues... And you know what?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll win so I can prove your faith in me isn't
misplaced!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You think my head is swollen like a balloon?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My head is of perfectly average size! And I'm not
overthinking anything! Not at all! But...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I do place too much weight on my
calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm always stuck in my thoughts during a race,
when I should be focusing on the opponents right
in front of me.
choice_data_list: Things will be all right. Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. My mind feels clearer now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won't let you down. I promise!
